description: Tuesday 2 December 2025 | Social Services and Community Committee 2024/25 Annual review of Oranga Tamariki — Ministry for Children Hearing of evidence: Hon Karen Chhour, Minister for Children Oranga Tamariki – Ministry for Children Andrew Bridgman, Acting Chief Executive Nicolette Dickson, Chief Social Worker and Deputy Chief Executive Professional Practice Geoff Short, Deputy Chief Executive System Leadership
descriptionSummary: 2024/25 Annual review of Oranga Tamariki — Ministry for Children. Hon Karen Chhour, Minister for Children. Oranga Tamariki – Ministry for Children
